category_description: Reference data reject codes: instrument lookup, calendar, and day-count resolution failures.

fixtures.title: License denied
fixtures.trigger_condition: An order references a CUSIP identifier, but the submitting firm's license record does not include CUSIP in its licensed_identifier_classes.

expected_reject.message: License denied: FIRM-ABC is not licensed to access CUSIP identifiers.

fixtures.remediation: Contact the licensing admin to add CUSIP to the firm's licensed_identifier_classes, or use a licensed identifier type (ISIN or FIGI).

fixtures.title: Unknown FIGI
fixtures.trigger_condition: An order references a FIGI that is not present in the security master.

expected_reject.message: Unknown FIGI: BBG000XXXXX not found in security master.

fixtures.remediation: Verify symbology onboarding for this instrument; re-fetch the FIGI from the identifier-mapping service before retransmitting.

fixtures.title: Instrument inactive
fixtures.trigger_condition: The referenced instrument's lifecycle_status is MATURED rather than ACTIVE.

expected_reject.message: Instrument BBG000B9XRZ4 is inactive (status: MATURED, matured 2024-12-31). Cannot accept new orders.

fixtures.remediation: Check whether the instrument has been replaced by a successor security (e.g., after maturity or corporate action); update the order to reference the active instrument.

fixtures.title: Instrument version stale
fixtures.trigger_condition: The order references instrument version 3, but a stock split corporate action has advanced the master version to 4.

expected_reject.message: Instrument BBG000B9XRZ4 version 3 is stale; current version is 4 (STOCK_SPLIT effective 2026-06-01).

fixtures.remediation: Re-fetch the current instrument version from the security master and resubmit the order with the updated version.

fixtures.title: Calendar not loaded
fixtures.trigger_condition: A bond order requires the GBP settlement calendar for settlement-date calculation, but the GBP-LONDON calendar is missing from the calendar service.

expected_reject.message: Calendar not loaded: GBP-LONDON calendar required for GBP settlement date calculation is missing or stale.

fixtures.remediation: Reload the holiday calendar for GBP-LONDON from the reference data provider; contact the data-platform team if the feed is stale.

fixtures.title: Day count not recognized
fixtures.trigger_condition: A bond order specifies day_count_convention='ACT/ACT-ISDA' but this code is not registered in the reference data day-count table.

expected_reject.message: Day count convention 'ACT/ACT-ISDA' is not recognized. Valid conventions: ACT/365, ACT/360, 30/360, ACT/ACT-ICMA.

fixtures.remediation: Use a recognized day-count convention code from the reference data catalog; contact the data-platform team to register new conventions.
